raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year> I took a cash advance from Barclaycardus Credit Card from a XXXX ATM machine for {$200.00}. That cash advance was duplicated XXXX times unbeknownst to me at the time. I contacted the Credit card company numerous times about this in XXXX. I locked the card. Later I was told that Barclay need to put some kind of hold on it, I called on XX/XX/XXXX and on the XXXX about these fraudulent charges. 

I also faxed them on XX/XX/XXXX. Today, XXXX XXXX, XXXX, I must have called and spoken to XXXX different representatives. This has been going on for a very long time. To this date the account still shows that I owe for all these fraudulent charges. The credit card company once again tells me that they are looking into the issue. They are not helpful. This is a very easy situation to explain. I'm still not sure they understand what is going on.
